flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Franciscan University of Steubenville rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.4k → $19.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Franciscan University of Steubenville rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.2k → $34.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Franciscan University of Steubenville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Franciscan University of Steubenville rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 2.9k).
